name: CBIZ, Inc.
business: CBIZ is a leading professional services advisor to middle-market businesses, providing services in accounting, tax, advisory, benefits, insurance, and technology. The company operates through three practice groups: Financial Services, Benefits and Insurance Services, and National Practices. Revenue is generated from a diversified client base across the United States, with the largest client (served by National Practices) contributing approximately 1.7% of consolidated revenue in 2025.

exposures.sentence: National Technology: Cloud & infrastructure solutions, Cybersecurity, GRC & DFIR services, Enterprise performance & technology, Strategic IT consulting
Benefits and Insurance Services: Employee Benefits Consulting, Payroll / Human Capital Management, Property and Casualty Insurance, Retirement and Investment Services

catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2026, the CBIZ Board of Directors authorized the purchase of up to 5.0 million shares of our common stock under our Share Repurchase Program, which may be suspended or discontinued at any time and expires on March 31, 2026.
The cost-plus contract is a five-year contract with the most recent renewal through December 31, 2028.
